subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: At the time of Muhammad, He sanctioned war for the preservation of the lives of His followers. The laws of individual justice were confused and preliminary in the souls of men.
subcodes.subjects: @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @Muhammad; Islam, @symbolism, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
